title: A Formal Model of How Artificial Intelligence Erodes Human Agency
summary_en: In this report, the authors draw on social choice theory to develop a formal model of how AI erodes collective human agency; they also model decisionmaking to identify the point beyond which this erosion could become irreversible.
title_cn: [еЊЕзњїиѓС] A Formal Model of How Artificial Intelligence Erodes Human Agency

title: Expanding School Counseling: The Impacts of California Funding Changes
summary_en: We use panel-based estimators to show that CaliforniaвАЩs Supplemental School Counseling Program increased the number of counselors on staff and improved counselor to student ratios, but reduced average counselor experience.
title_cn: [еЊЕзњїиѓС] Expanding School Counseling: The Impacts of California Funding Changes
